feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Variable Prompt
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a variable prompt from a live BEX query with multiple variables on it.

One of the variables (Business Unit) is pre loaded.

Other variable values below this should be restricted by Business Unit but they seem to be showing all the members. Obviously on a normal SAC filter we can sort this with only showing posted values however in the prompt it looks like by default that is already set to show only posted values but it shows all values?

The Production Line and Work Centre variables do not seem to be filtered by the plant variable.

This should only show "1" here.

Any help appreciated

entry.title: Changing the export to CSV default delimiter from comma(,) to semicolon(;) in SAC
entry.content:
Hi SAC  Experts,

Currently, the export to CSV script uses a comma (,) as the default delimiter. To better accommodate German users, we can change the default delimiter to a semicolon (;). This adjustment ensures compatibility with regional preferences and enhances usability
Button to Export to CSV:

Script to export to CSV:

entry.title: Updating Dimension Attributes in a model
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I request some help with a requirement to incorporate YTD Gross values from external files into tax calculations. Currently, YTD values are derived from monthly wages in the system, but we now need to use the YTD from the file for the last month of each quarter.

  1. Flow:

    • For March 2025, overwrite the YTD value with the file’s YTD.

    • For April 2025, calculate YTD as (March’s file YTD + April’s SAC-calculated wage).

  2. Approach Followed:

    • Step 1: Load the file into the “Actual” version, mapping Employee ID, Period, and YTD to dimensions/measures. Default values (e.g., 1900-01-01, #) are used for missing attributes like dates, company code, shift, etc.

    • Step 2: Use a data action to copy from “Actual” to “Working Forecast,” assigning dimension values from master data.

    • Step 3: Shift data is pulled from a different model using LINK (since it’s absent in master data).

  3. Issue: Company code is not in master data but exists in the same model under a different data source. Attempts to use RESULTLOOKUP failed.

Code Snippet:

// Define Membersets
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/GL_ACCOUNT] = ("EMP_SALARY")
MEMBERSET [d/MEASURE_TYPE] = "M00"
MEMBERSET [d/TIME] = %CutOffMonth%
 
// 1. Copy value from Actual/PROLL_YTD_GROSS to CALC-REG/SS_YTD5
DATA(
// Target Context
[d/DATASRC] = "CALC-REG", [d/GL_ACCOUNT] = "SS_YTD5", [d/TIME] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/TIME]),
// Populate Dimensions from Master Data
[d/START_DATE] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/ST_DATE_FORMATTED], [d/COSTCENTER] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/COSTCENTER],
[d/EMPSTAT] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/POS_STAT],
// Explicit Empty Dimensions
[d/END_DATE] = "", [d/TERM_DATE] = ""
) =
ROUND(
  RESULTLOOKUP(
   [d/VERSION] = "public.Actual", [d/DATASRC] = "PROLL_YTD_GROSS",
   [d/TIME] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/TIME]), [d/SHIFT] = "#"
  ), 2)
* ((
LINK(
[SHIFT_MAPPING], [d/Version] = "public.Update Shift", [d/Date] = "202301", [d/EMP_CLASS] = "#",
[d/EMP_TYPE] = "#", [d/SHIFT_CODE] = "#", [d/WORK_SCHEDULE] = "#"
) * 0
   ) + 1)
 
Any inputs would be greatly helpful.
 
Thanks in Advance,
Phani

entry.title: unable to create connection from SF to SAC & datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Please help me with this as im getting very annoyed on why we cannot create one simple connection, my intention is to create a connection between SF and SAC and Datasphere. could someone tell me the step-by-step process. I have searched many articular, but none has been very useful. i have screenshot from SF side with Oauth2 setup and SAC. the error i get is : Unable to connect to datasource. Check the connection details and user credentials, and then try again.

the question does this connection looks right and the USER id does it need special step that i have missed?

entry.title: How to import master data from Datasphere to SAC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to create a new Public dimension in SAC and import the Master data (Attributes, Texts and Hierarchies) to the SAC dimension.

Please let me know if it is possible. Any detailed steps/guide to configure would be of great help.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat

entry.title: SAC Modeler - load data into a model - defines blank as '<root>'
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Modeler, whenever I load data into a model from an Excel file that includes blank values in a certain column, the system automatically defines everything that is blank as '<root>' in the hierarchy.
Is there a way to disable this?
So that blank values appear as they are (for example, an empty cell or another value I define) instead of creating the '<root>' entry in the hierarchy.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Query regarding changing the default delimiter from comma (,) to a semicolon (;) in SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently, the export to CSV script uses a comma (,) as the default delimiter. To better accommodate German users. Can someone help here to change the default delimiter from comma (,) to a semicolon (;) via script ?

Current Setup:

Button to Export to CSV:

Script to export to CSV:

entry.title: SAC Story Time dimension issue (Previous year data display issue )
entry.content:
Hi All,

 Need your Input on Time  Dimension 

Our requirement is  we have data since 1995 to 2025

Using Input control or Filer when select 202503 as single selection  as date we need to see date from 1995 to 202503

Can you suggest in detail

entry.title: Hide/show totals of a SAC Story Table dimension dynamically
entry.content:
Hi, 

I would like to know if there is a way to hide/show totals of a Dimension on a SAC Story Tables dynamically via scripting. In our scenario, per default we show totals, users are able to add a dimension to table, and with the new added dimension totals doesn't make sense. 

Thanks 

Emil

entry.title: Persistence of CDS view created on S4HANA into a separate HANA Database
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there an option to persist CDS view data in the HANA database when HANA DB is being used as a middleware or data warehouse?

In my scenario, I have legacy data stored in HANA DB and OLTP data in S/4HANA. I would like to create a combined view of both datasets and expose it to SAC. My objective is to establish a mechanism that allows us to create CDS views in S/4HANA and transfer them to another HANA database, which will function as a middleware layer.

In my case, a custom SQL view (ZSQL) has been created in S/4HANA using CDS. How can this view be accessed or persisted in a separate HANA database that is acting as a middleware or data warehouse?
I have two HANA databases: one serving OLAP purposes (data warehouse/middleware) and the other being the S/4HANA OLTP system.

entry.title: to remove "Switch to Read-only-Mode" in the table Contextual Menu
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

we have several SAC Planning stories built with javascript code and we using Live BPC connection.

we know that there is no option in order to flag this option in the table Quick Menu. 

Under javascript code in the story. Anyone knows how to manage this topic?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Upload/copy paste to table level not to model in SAP SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi Experts!!

Here is the requirement!!

we want to copy paste from excel to SAC table /Story. While copy pasting it is taking time and performance is poor. is there any custom widget or solution to upload a file just to story table respecting filters not to model level.

Note:

1.Kindly don't recommend Upload starter , as our model has many dimensions to map, where user file doesn' t have , it has to pick up story/table level filters.

2. We have already pre-populated the data to initialize the combinations with zero's , as our data is a NON-SAP data at discrete level. (validation rules will not work as we have more than 8 dimensions)

using CSV or Excel file just upload data to story at table level only (Not via Upload/Import Jobs from model)

Model level /upload starter we tried , but we have to write custom logic to fetch other dimensions 

 

Thanks

Surya Harsha

 

@William_Yu  

@N1kh1l

entry.title: SAP Datasphere license just to consume data in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Is a separate Datasphere license required solely for consuming data in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)? If a user has an SAC license and the SAC reports retrieve data from Datasphere, does the user also need a Datasphere license? Note that the SAC user does not need to log in to Datasphere.

Best Regards
Arvind

entry.title: How to fetch the data from a page in SAC dashboard for further use?
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

As I’m new to SAP Analytics Cloud, could you advise on fetching data from dashboards (single charts or entire pages)? I want to utilize this data for further use.

  1. Is scripting required, if Yes, how I can do that?

  2. Supported formats (Excel, CSV, etc.)?

  3. Any automation/governance best practices?

A brief demo or tips would be helpful. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hyperlink on Numeric Chart Value in Embedded SAC Requires Double Click
entry.content:
We have created an embedded SAC report [Story] within the SAP Sales and Service Cloud v2 (SCV2) system. As per our requirement, we added a hyperlink directly to the numeric value in a chart (not in the title). While the hyperlink is functional, users are required to click twice—first to select the data point and then to activate the hyperlink.

We would like to know if there is a way to enable the hyperlink to trigger on a single click directly on the data point, rather than requiring two interactions. This behavior is negatively impacting the user experience, and we are looking for a solution or workaround to streamline the navigation.

Kindly advise if this is a known limitation on embedded analytics or if there is a configuration or workaround available to achieve single-click hyperlink activation on chart values.

entry.title: SAC Table values calculating in sac tables using Formulas
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to calculate values using data from table 1 row 20  and table 3 Row 13 and put them in  table 2: Row 1  highlighted as A   

 

Can you help with formulas to achieve and possible solutions

entry.title: Multi Action and Conditionals
entry.content:
Hello!!

Is there a way to put an execution condition on a multi action on SAC? For example, between 2 data actions, put a condition so that the second one would be executed only if an account x = 100 (result of the calculation of  last step in the first data action).

.

entry.title: Unable to set a connection from SAP Analytics Cloud to PostgreSQL 17 through JDBC Driver
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

we are currently not able to set a connection in import from PostgreSQL 17 Database to SAC. In the official documentation seems that only version until 13 is currently supported. Is there any workaround to handle it?

SAP Analytics Cloud PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

entry.title: 2 simple questions about SAC table
entry.content:
Hi,

Here are two simple questions we want to figure out:

1. Is it possible to sort by 2 measures on a single table?

2. How to filter the rows where the corresponding measure value > 25%?

Thanks for your help.

Regards,

Jason

entry.title: Analysis for Microsoft Office compatible with Microsoft Office 2024
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

The SAP packages listed below are currently not compatible with Microsoft Office 2024.

  1. SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office
  2. SAP BusinessObjects EPM addin for MS office Client
  3. SAP BusinessObjects Live Office
  4. SAP BW Business Explorer - for SAP GUI 8.0

The above components are working fine when users are using Microsoft office 2016. After migrating to Microsoft Office 2024, the above applications are not working. Could you please guide me or share what are the required steps we need to perform to make the above applications to work.

Thanks.
